Creativity Boosters: Exercises and Inspirations

I know how hard it is to be stuck in a creative rut, but here are some exercises and inspirations to boost your creativity. Let's get those creative juices flowing!

1

Smile Curation

13

Skip the Line: Park Guell and La Sagrada Familia Guided Tour

I really think we maximized our time in Barcelona with this tour. Both Park Güell and Sagrada Familia are must-see sites, and this tour helped with the transfers. Park tickets were sold out the day we were there, so if you were not with a tour, you were out of luck. As for Sagrada Familia, you must do the skip-the-line option. It would be overwhelming and chaotic without a guide, plus you would be waiting for a long time to get in. I was in awe of Sagrada Familia, and seeing pictures of it just did not come close to experiencing it in real form. I have not seen a cathedral like this! Park Güell is nice to walk around. I love the thought process behind designing the landscape of the whole park. The tour did not include admission tickets to the Park Güell museum, and honestly, you don't really have to go inside. Our tour guide was very attentive. We had some audio technical difficulties, and she was able to exchange for new headsets without too much delay at the cathedral.👍

Bar del Pla -El born

extremely good tapas restaurant close to the Picasso Museum. Make reservation ahead of time. This place is packed! Delicious food and lively atmosphere. Some interesting tapas including mushrooms and wasabi, beef and foie tartar, Oxtail “Mollete”

Ola Living Portaferrissa, Barcelona, Spain

We stayed at this apartment rental. It is in a central location; very close to the Rambla, La Boqueria and the Gothic quarter. The apartment was spacious and was happy with everything.

Barcelona Must do Tours and Tapas Bars

We visited Spain and Portugal back in May and we had a great trip. We stayed close to the Gothic Quarter, which was quite central to most tourist spots. It is a wonderful city and I would definitely go back again!

Organic Eucalyptus Salve 45g

This is one of my favourite salves for the winter. This can be used on the chest, feet, in warm water, in the bath and under the nose for us adults. It is my winter go to product.

Eucalyptus Radiata Essential Oil 10ml

One bottle will last the whole winter. Pop a few drops in a diffuser or hot water. Add to a teatowel over the radiator, add to the bath and under a pillow.

Fired Up Herbal Tea x18 Bags

Ginger and Tumeric are full of warming healing in the winter months. Great for immune support and decreasing inflammation.

From Khao Lak : Full-Day Private Phi Phi Islands Speedboat Charter

Enjoy the Andaman Sea and Phi Phi Islands by speedboat during this 11-hour private charter from Khao Lak. Visit Bamboo Island, Monkey Beach, and Pileh Lagoon as you snorkel and relax. This activity includes hotel pickup and drop-off.

nichole

45

Musubi Cafe Iyasume

Inexpensive delicious musubi to satisfy your craving!! I always go here to grab some musubis!!

Nico's Pier 38

You can either order poke and seafood to-go fresh from the deli (eat it at your table or take to-go), or order off their food menu in the restaurant. Live music every day - check the times on their website! Drinks and food, sunny open aired ambiance. I love coming here and it's on your way to the airport to stop for lunch before a flight!

Waimea Bay Beach Park

MY FAVORITE BEACH ON THE ISLAND. Family friendly bay to swim, clear blue waters, easy to get in and out of (of course depends on time of year but most of the year it's easy). Can even go snorkeling either on the far left side behind the giant rock or the far right side just be cautious and careful of the waves if you aren't a strong swimmer. Can also jump off the rock for some added adventure! I personally like going to the far right side of the beach closest to the road away from the business of the parking lot. Not as many people over there usually. If you can't find parking in the lot, you can park down the road either direction from the lot alongside the road or at the little parking lot past the beach towards sunset there's a small parking lot for the little beach spot there you can use and walk back along the road to the beach. There's an entrance from the roadside to get down to the sand!
